entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Complex farming systems managed by small-scale farmers facing challenges in technology adoption

entities.name: INTEGRATED ANALYSIS TOOL
entities.description: A rule-based dynamic simulation model used to analyze and improve farming system performance

entities.name: TAMIL NADU
entities.description: A state in India where the farming systems were studied

entities.name: BLACK GRAM-BASED FARMING SYSTEM
entities.description: A farming system centered on black gram cultivation, also referred to as BFS

entities.name: PADDY-BASED FARMING SYSTEM
entities.description: A farming system centered on paddy cultivation, also referred to as PFS

entities.name: INTEGRATED FARMING SYSTEMS
entities.description: A diversified farming system found to be the most profitable and resilient, used as a benchmark

entities.name: DRYLAND FARMING SYSTEM
entities.description: A farming system practiced in dryland areas, also referred to as DFS

entities.name: VILLUPURAM DISTRICT
entities.description: A district in Tamil Nadu where BFS, PFS, and IFS were analyzed

entities.name: VIRUDHUNAGAR DISTRICT
entities.description: A district in Tamil Nadu where DFS was analyzed

entities.name: BLACK GRAM
entities.description: A legume crop used in BFS

entities.name: PADDY
entities.description: A staple cereal crop used in PFS

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An oilseed crop used in DFS and as a trade-off in PFS

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal crop used as a trade-off in PFS

entities.name: SUGARCANE
entities.description: A crop evaluated for replacement in PFS

entities.name: TAPIOCA
entities.description: A root crop evaluated as a replacement for sugarcane in PFS

entities.name: TURMERIC
entities.description: A spice crop evaluated as a replacement for sugarcane in PFS

entities.name: MULTI-BLOOM TECHNOLOGY
entities.description: A technology applied to black gram to increase net profit

entities.name: LIVESTOCK MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Improved practices used to increase net profit in DFS

entities.name: CROP YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of crops per unit area

entities.name: IRRIGATION INFRASTRUCTURE
entities.description: Physical systems for water delivery required to enhance crop yield

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL POLICY
entities.description: Guidelines and interventions focusing on profitability and farmer acceptability

entities.name: RAINFED
entities.description: Cultivation relying on rainfall rather than irrigation
